label: Designation
description: Defines a map designation marker such as mining, hauling, hunting, deconstruction, painting, or plant cutting.

texturePath.label: Texture path
texturePath.description: Texture asset path used for the designation overlay icon. This is a raw, untranslated asset path.

targetType.label: Target type
targetType.description: Whether this designation targets a thing or a map cell.

removeIfBuildingDespawned.label: Remove if building despawned
removeIfBuildingDespawned.description: If true, the designation is removed when its target building despawns.

designateCancelable.label: Designation cancelable
designateCancelable.description: If true, normal cancel-designation actions can remove this designation.

shouldBatchDraw.label: Should batch draw
shouldBatchDraw.description: If true, cell designations may be drawn through the batched instancing path.

basic-designation.label: Basic designation
basic-designation.description: Minimal designation with a def name, texture path, and target type.
